zh.lifeSummary: 當Warin de Munchensy於大約1113年出生在英國素福爾可艾德沃德斯同時，他的父親Hubert de Munchensy49歲，母親Muriel de Valoignes27歲。他於大約1148年與Agnes FitzPayn Countess of Herefordshire在英國英格蘭諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1162年之前在英國諾福爾可古德斯東，埋葬在英國諾福爾可巴肯哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Warin de Munchensy于大约1113年出生在英国素福爾可艾德沃德斯同时，他的父亲Hubert de Munchensy49岁，母亲Muriel de Valoignes27岁。他于大约1148年与Agnes FitzPayn Countess of Herefordshire在英国英格兰諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1162年之前在英国諾福爾可古德斯東，埋葬在英国諾福爾可巴肯哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Warin
meanings: An old name. The same as Waring or Guerin, who came over with the Conqueror; a name probably connected with that of the Waernas or Wernas. the Varini or Verini, a people of the Elbe

en.lifeSummary: When Warin de Munchensy was born about 1113, in Edwardstone, Suffolk, England, his father, Hubert de Munchensy, was 49 and his mother, Muriel de Valoignes, was 27. He married Agnes FitzPayn Countess of Herefordshire about 1148, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died before 1162, in Gooderstone, Norfolk, England, and was buried in Buckenham, Norfolk, England.

fr.Old Abingdon Abbey, Berkshire, England,: Old Abingdon Abbey, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Warin de Munchensy est né environ 1113, à Edwardstone, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Hubert de Munchensy, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Muriel de Valoignes, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Agnes FitzPayn Countess of Herefordshire environ 1148, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé avant 1162, à Gooderstone, Norfolk, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Buckenham, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.Old Abingdon Abbey, Berkshire, England,: Old Abingdon Abbey, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Warin de Munchensy um 1113 in Edwardstone, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hubert de Munchensy 49 und seine Mutter Muriel de Valoignes 27. Er hat um 1148 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Agnes FitzPayn Countess of Herefordshire geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb vor 1162 in Gooderstone, Norfolk, England und wurde in Buckenham, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Warin de Munchensy è nato il circa 1113 nel Edwardstone, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Hubert de Munchensy, aveva 49 anni e il suo madre, Muriel de Valoignes, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Agnes FitzPayn Countess of Herefordshire circa 1148, nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 1162, nel Gooderstone, Norfolk, England, e fu sepolto a Buckenham, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Warin de Munchensyが約1113年にイギリススフォルクエドワードストーンで生まれた時，父Hubert de Munchensyは49歳，母Muriel de Valoignesは27歳であった。約1148年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクでAgnes FitzPayn Countess of Herefordshireと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1162年以前にイギリスノーフォルクグダーストーンで死去し，イギリスノーフォルクブクエンハムにて埋葬された。

ko.Old Abingdon Abbey, Berkshire, England,: 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 드 압잉던 애브브이
ko.lifeSummary: Warin de Munchensy(이)가 대략 1113년 영국 수폴크 에드워스톤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hubert de Munchensy(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Muriel de Valoignes(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1148년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 Agnes FitzPayn Countess of Herefordshire(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1162년 이전 영국 노르폴크 구더스톤에서 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 벅함에 묻혔다.

pt.Old Abingdon Abbey, Berkshire, England,: Old Abingdon Abbey, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Warin de Munchensy nasceu aproximadamente 1113, em Edwardstone, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hubert de Munchensy, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Muriel de Valoignes, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes FitzPayn Countess of Herefordshire aproximadamente 1148, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 1162, em Gooderstone, Norfolk, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Buckenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ro.Old Abingdon Abbey, Berkshire, England,: Old Abingdon Abbey, Berkshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.Old Abingdon Abbey, Berkshire, England,: олд абингдон эбби, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Warin de Munchensy родился около 1113 г. в местности эдвардстоун, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Hubert de Munchensy было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Muriel de Valoignes, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes FitzPayn Countess of Herefordshire около 1148 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер перед 1162 г. в местности гудирстоун, норфолк, Англия и был похоронен в местности буккенам, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Warin de Munchensy nació aproximadamente 1113, en Edwardstone, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Hubert de Munchensy, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Muriel de Valoignes, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Agnes FitzPayn Countess of Herefordshire aproximadamente 1148, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió antes de 1162, en Gooderstone, Norfolk, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Buckenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
